evals.prompt: what's the current input and output token price for gpt-4o on openai? i need usd per million tokens for a slide deck
evals.expected_output: GET /v1/price/openai with model_id=gpt-4o or /v1/price/search?q=gpt-4o; read pricing.prompt and pricing.completion; convert to per-million
expectations: Uses GET https://api.narev.ai/v1/price/openai or GET https://api.narev.ai/v1/price/search
Does not use GET /v1/models/pricing or GET /models/pricing
States rates are USD per token from pricing.prompt and pricing.completion
Multiplies by 1_000_000 for per-million display

evals.prompt: i have 1200 prompt tokens and 400 completion tokens on claude-sonnet-4 from anthropic. how much did that one call cost in usd?
evals.expected_output: POST /v1/calculate with modelId, provider anthropic, usage integers; report costBreakdown.total
expectations: Uses POST https://api.narev.ai/v1/calculate
Does not use POST /models/pricing/calculate or POST /v1/models/pricing/calculate
Includes all required usage integers with zeros for unused categories
References costBreakdown.total

evals.prompt: which providers does narev support for llm pricing?
expectations: Uses GET https://api.narev.ai/v1/reference/providers
Describes data as provider_id and name pairs
Does not invent providers not from the API

evals.prompt: my calculate request returns 400. my body only has promptTokens and completionTokens in usage
evals.expected_output: 400 from usage validation; all usage fields required; pass 0 for unused
expectations: References POST /v1/calculate
Lists cacheReadTokens, cacheWriteTokens, reasoningTokens as required with 0 if unused

evals.prompt: i want to snapshot model prices into our repo every night. which api should the script call?
evals.expected_output: update-llm-pricing; paginate GET /v1/price/search or GET /v1/price per provider; not calculate
expectations: Points to update-llm-pricing for committed snapshots
Recommends GET /v1/price/search or GET /v1/price/{provider_id} with pagination
Does not recommend POST /v1/calculate for bulk snapshots
Does not use GET /v1/models/pricing

evals.prompt: which narev api endpoint shows me the cheapest provider for gpt-4o across all hosts?
expectations: Uses GET https://api.narev.ai/v1/find/cheapest/gpt-4o
States results sort by prompt price cheapest first
Does not use POST /v1/calculate to compare providers
